title: Charred Chewy Indulgent Dutch Fries Hash
description: A rich and satisfying side or light meal. Combining the flavors of Dutch cuisine with a modern twist.
instructions: Peel and cut the potatoes into large chunks. Cut the rosemary into small sprigs.
In a bowl, mix together coconut oil, madras paste, chili flakes, salt, black pepper, and rosemary sprigs. Add the potatoes and toss to coat.
Transfer the potatoes to a baking sheet and roast for 20 minutes.
Increase oven temperature to 250°C (475°F) and continue roasting for a further 15 minutes, or until the potatoes are charred and crispy.
While the potatoes are roasting, fry the bacon bits in a pan until crispy. Set aside.
Once the potatoes are done, transfer them to the pan with the bacon and toss to combine.
Serve hot, garnished with additional rosemary sprigs if desired.
